strengths: 20 years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains with demonstrated expertise in high-scale systems (microservices handling millions of requests/second)
Founder of GISCollective (2016–present) showing sustained entrepreneurial initiative and open-source platform building
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, indicating recent engagement with AI/ML tooling
concerns: No advanced degree in AI-related field; both degrees are in Computer Science and Fine Arts, not AI-specific, missing preferred qualification
Limited demonstrated expertise in AI/ML products or strategic platforms; current AI work appears infrastructure/tooling-focused rather than product or strategic
Currently Staff-level, not Principal/Director-level; no clear track record of strategic advisory work to customers on cloud and AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure experience at re:cinq

response.justification: Bogdan has solid technical credentials exceeding the 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates entrepreneurial leadership through GISCollective. His current role at re:cinq shows engagement with AI infrastructure. However, the role explicitly requires deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and demonstrated AI products—areas where his background shows primarily infrastructure, tooling, and full-stack engineering work rather than strategic AI product leadership or customer advisory experience. Recent AI exposure is a positive signal but insufficient evidence of the strategic AI expertise needed for this director-level position.
